---
title: "Kernel: Cauchy"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Kernel: Cauchy}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  cache = TRUE,
  cache.path = "cache/kernel-cauchy-",
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r cauchy-setup}
library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)
use_cached_fit <- TRUE
.fit_path <- function(name) {
  path <- system.file("extdata", name, package = "DPmixGPD")
  if (path == "") path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", name)
  path
}
fit_small <- readRDS(.fit_path("fit_small.rds"))
```

```{r cauchy-params-define}
w <- c(0.5, 0.5)
location <- c(-0.5, 0.5)
scale <- c(0.7, 1.0)

x <- 0.2
p <- 0.9
```

```{r cauchy-densities-mix}
dCauchyMix(x, w = w, location = location, scale = scale, log = FALSE)
pCauchyMix(x, w = w, location = location, scale = scale, lower.tail = TRUE, log.p = FALSE)
qCauchyMix(p, w = w, location = location, scale = scale)
```

```{r cauchy-data-gen}
set.seed(1)
y <- abs(rcauchy(30)) + 0.1
```

```{r cauchy-model-spec}
bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "cauchy",
  GPD = FALSE,
  J = 6
)
```

```{r cauchy-spec-metadata}
bundle$spec$meta
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
